supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute a DB query using scenario-prepared parameters.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈
notes: The step delegates to DataBaseMethods.queryInDatabase and does not save the result in a named scenario variable.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute a DB query after creating scenario variables from a parameter table, with optional restoration of previous variables.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈 懈蟹 褌邪斜谢懈褑褘( 斜械蟹 锌械褉械蟹邪锌懈褋懈 锌械褉械屑械薪薪褘褏)?
notes: Table values are resolved through scenario-variable substitution before execution.
When the optional '斜械蟹 锌械褉械蟹邪锌懈褋懈 锌械褉械屑械薪薪褘褏' suffix is present, the implementation restores the previous scenario variables after the query.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute a DB query using scenario-prepared parameters and save the row-list result in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈 懈 褋芯褏褉邪薪褟械屑 褉械蟹褍谢褜褌邪褌 胁 "(.+)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute a DB query with table-provided parameters and save the row-list result in a scenario variable, with optional restoration of previous variables.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈 懈蟹 褌邪斜谢懈褑褘( 斜械蟹 锌械褉械蟹邪锌懈褋懈 锌械褉械屑械薪薪褘褏)? 懈 褋芯褏褉邪薪褟械屑 褉械蟹褍谢褜褌邪褌 胁 "(.+)"
notes: The saved value is the List<Map<String,Object>> result returned by DataBaseMethods.queryInDatabase.
When the optional '斜械蟹 锌械褉械蟹邪锌懈褋懈 锌械褉械屑械薪薪褘褏' suffix is present, previously existing scenario variables are restored after the query.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute a DB query and assert that the result is empty.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 "(.+)" 懈 锌芯谢褍褔邪械屑 锌褍褋褌芯泄 芯褌胁械褌
notes: On failure, the thrown exception message includes the resolved query text from DataBaseMethods.getQuery.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute a DB query with table-provided parameters and wait until the result becomes non-empty.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈 懈蟹 褌邪斜谢懈褑褘 懈 卸写褢屑 锌芯泻邪 锌褉懈写褢褌 薪械锌褍褋褌芯泄 芯褌胁械褌
notes: The reviewed implementation polls in the same thread every 1 second for up to 60 seconds.
Timeout handling is limited to converting Awaitility timeout into the fixed message '袙褉械屑褟 芯卸懈写邪薪懈褟 懈褋褌械泻谢芯'.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert expected column values against the first row of a stored DB result.
stepPatterns: 胁 芯褌胁械褌械 芯褌 袘袛 "(.+)", 锌褉芯胁械褉褟械屑 蟹薪邪褔械薪懈褟 锌芯谢械泄
notes: The implementation reads only resultList.get(0), so this step does not assert all rows.
Expected values support the reviewed sentinel values 'null' and 'not_null'.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert stored DB rows against an expected table while preserving row order.
stepPatterns: 胁 芯褌胁械褌械 芯褌 袘袛 "(.+)" 锌褉芯胁械褉褟械屑 蟹薪邪褔械薪懈褟 锌芯谢械泄 褋 褍褔褢褌芯屑 锌芯褉褟写泻邪 褋褌褉芯泻:?
notes: The implementation compares rows pairwise and separately asserts that actual and expected row counts match.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert stored DB rows against an expected table without requiring row order.
stepPatterns: 胁 芯褌胁械褌械 芯褌 袘袛 "(.+)" 锌褉芯胁械褉褟械屑 蟹薪邪褔械薪懈褟 锌芯谢械泄 斜械蟹 褍褔褢褌邪 锌芯褉褟写泻邪 褋褌褉芯泻:?
notes: Row matching uses helper comparison logic that resolves expected values without property lookup.
The step also asserts that actual and expected row counts match.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Save the first available value from a named DB result column as text or object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: 懈蟹 芯褌胁械褌邪 芯褌 袘袛 "(.*)" 蟹薪邪褔械薪懈械 褋褌芯谢斜褑邪 "(.*)" 褋芯褏褉邪薪械薪芯 泻邪泻 ?(褌械泻褋褌|芯斜褗械泻褌) 胁 锌械褉械屑械薪薪褍褞 "(.*)"
notes: The implementation streams over rows and takes findFirst(), so it saves the first available column value only.
For '褌械泻褋褌' the stored value is value.toString(); for '芯斜褗械泻褌' the original object is stored.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Save all values from a named DB result column as one formatted string in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: 懈蟹 芯褌胁械褌邪 芯褌 袘袛 "(.*)" 蟹薪邪褔械薪懈械 褋褌芯谢斜褑邪 "(.*)" 褋芯褏褉邪薪械薪芯 泻邪泻 屑邪褋褋懈胁 褋褌褉芯泻 褎芯褉屑邪褌邪 "(.*)" 胁 锌械褉械屑械薪薪褍褞 "(.*)"
notes: The implementation converts column values to strings and then delegates formatting to prepareStringFromList(format).
This bundle does not claim arbitrary collection serialization semantics beyond that reviewed formatting helper call.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute a DB query and save the result as a JSON string in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈 懈 褋芯褏褉邪薪褟械屑 褉械蟹褍谢褜褌邪褌 胁 锌械褉械屑械薪薪褍褞 "(.+)" 胁 胁懈写械 json 褋褌褉芯泻懈
notes: The JSON conversion is delegated to StringHelper.objectToJsonString on the row-list query result.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute an update/delete/insert-style DB query and return the affected row count.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 (?:芯斜薪芯胁谢械薪懈褟|褍写邪谢械薪懈褟|写芯斜邪胁谢械薪懈褟) "(.+)"
notes: The implementation logs the affected row count but does not itself assert a minimum row count.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute an update/delete/insert-style DB query after creating scenario variables from a parameter table.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 (?:芯斜薪芯胁谢械薪懈褟|褍写邪谢械薪懈褟|写芯斜邪胁谢械薪懈褟) "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈 懈蟹 褌邪斜谢懈褑褘

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute an update/delete/insert-style DB query and assert that more than zero rows were affected.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 (?:芯斜薪芯胁谢械薪懈褟|褍写邪谢械薪懈褟|写芯斜邪胁谢械薪懈褟) "(.+)" 懈 锌褉芯胁械褉褟械屑 锌芯谢褍褔械薪薪褘泄 芯褌胁械褌

supportedCapabilities.summary: Execute an update/delete/insert-style DB query with table-provided parameters and assert that more than zero rows were affected.
stepPatterns: 胁 袘袛 "(.+)" 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟械屑 蟹邪锌褉芯褋 (?:芯斜薪芯胁谢械薪懈褟|褍写邪谢械薪懈褟|写芯斜邪胁谢械薪懈褟) "(.+)" 褋 锌邪褉邪屑械褌褉邪屑懈 懈蟹 褌邪斜谢懈褑褘 懈 锌褉芯胁械褉褟械屑 锌芯谢褍褔械薪薪褘泄 芯褌胁械褌
